name: astrid
description: Run Codex as a governed Astrid agent: capsule tools over MCP, SessionStart update doctor, host policy hooks, and a codex-code principal.

interface.longDescription: Adds Astrid operating instructions, MCP server configuration, SessionStart doctor, and hook defaults so Codex can act as a principal-scoped Astrid agent.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Astrid: preserve Astrid boundaries and route tool authority through Astrid where available.
